description:
Configure three VeraCrypt volumes as 'Favorite Volumes' to automate their mounting. 

The volumes are located in /home/ga/Volumes/:
1. 'project_active.hc' (Password: 'Project2024!')
2. 'reference_docs.hc' (Password: 'RefDocs2024!')
3. 'archive_cold.hc' (Password: 'Archive2024!')

Configure 'archive_cold.hc' specifically to mount as Read-Only. The other two should be standard Read-Write. 

After configuring the favorites, use the 'Mount Favorite Volumes' feature to mount all three simultaneously. Ensure all three remain mounted.
